old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-anr","title":"Harmonize Beads and GSD workflow guidance","description":"Audit and tighten ai-harness scaffold docs, runtime scripts, and rules so the documented workflow clearly follows Beads -\u003e GSD -\u003e Beads. Cover graceful degradation when bd or .beads is unavailable, phase-level issue tracking expectations, verification-before-close rules, and landing/bootstrap guidance. Note the current gap that no autonomous.md exists in this repo and avoid hard-coding unsupported Beads config keys without version validation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T06:43:51Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T06:43:51Z"}

new_value: Verified Beads/GSD harmonization docs and scripts with pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:smoke:dist, and ai-harness doctor . --assistant codex

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-64p","title":"Decide autonomous.md and Beads config integration strategy","description":"Follow up on the remaining gap between the desired autonomous GSD workflow integration and the current ai-harness scaffold. The repo currently has no autonomous.md surface, and the proposed Beads config key export_to_jsonl does not match the active upstream .beads/config.yaml comments in this environment, which reference events-export instead. Decide whether ai-harness should scaffold a dedicated autonomous workflow doc, how that should coexist with AGENTS.md and .codex docs, and whether post-bd-init config should enable JSONL or event export for automation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T06:47:48Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T06:47:48Z"}

new_value: Verified autonomous workflow scaffold at .codex/workflows/autonomous-execution.md, aligned runtime docs, and chose not to hard-code Beads export config until version-specific keys are validated; confirmed with pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:smoke:dist, and ai-harness doctor . --assistant codex

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-ifw","title":"Ignore Beads runtime monitor files","description":"Stop tracking transient .beads runtime files such as dolt-monitor.pid and dolt-server.activity so the ai-harness worktree can stay clean after running bd commands.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T07:07:46Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T07:07:46Z"}

new_value: Removed transient Beads monitor files from version control and ignored them in .gitignore so local bd activity no longer dirties the worktree.

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-vfj","title":"Replace deprecated bd sync guidance","description":"Update ai-harness docs, runtime scripts, and scaffold templates to stop recommending deprecated 'bd sync' usage. Prefer the current 'bd dolt pull' and 'bd dolt push' flow where appropriate, and verify downstream scaffold snapshots stay aligned.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T07:11:23Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T07:11:23Z"}

new_value: Replaced deprecated bd sync guidance with bd dolt pull/push in landing docs and scripts; verified with pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, and pnpm test:smoke:dist.

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-e5c","title":"Configure Beads Dolt remote for landing workflow","description":"The updated landing workflow now prefers 'bd dolt pull' and 'bd dolt push', but this repository currently has no configured Dolt remote. Running 'bd dolt pull' fails with 'remote origin not found'. Decide whether ai-harness should document this as optional local setup, add clearer graceful degradation in landing guidance, or configure a real Dolt remote for the shared backlog.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T07:13:36Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T07:13:36Z"}

new_value: Cleaned the repo up for project-local Beads usage only: removed Dolt remote sync guidance from landing docs/scripts, stopped requiring BEADS_DOLT_PASSWORD in scaffolded env files and doctor checks, and verified local-only downstream adoption with pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:smoke:dist, and ai-harness doctor.
